text: Apoptosis: the secret behind healthy organs. This controlled cell self-destruction isn’t just a process; it’s life’s blueprint. Imagine thousands of cells dying at the right moment, shaping your organs. Research shows that apoptosis also prevents diseases like cancer. So, programmed cell death isn’t just normal; it’s crucial for our health. Curious about more amazing science facts? Hit that follow button!
